name: Bakewell Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 425°F or Mark 7.
2. Roll out the pastry and line a wide shallow dish or pie plate with it.
3. Spread the pastry with a thick layer of strawberry jam.
4. Cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add egg yolks, beaten egg whites, and almond essence, mixing well.
5. Spread the mixture over the jam in the prepared dish.
6. Bake for 15 minutes at 425°F (Mark 7).
7. Reduce heat to 350°F or Mark 4 and bake for an additional 20 minutes. The filling is meant to remain soft and is not intended to set.
